subcodes.first_line: The verses have rained down from the heaven of God's Will, and clear evidences have been manifested in such wise that none would deny them save every polytheist [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد هطلت الایات من سماء مشیه الله و ظهرت البینات علی شان لاینکرها الا کل مشرک
subcodes.subjects: @living waters; water of life, @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @praise and encouragement, @belief and denial
